news-korea-econ.title: Revolutionary Tourism: Inside the $600M marriage of dark money and far-left agitprop
news-korea-econ.description: A Fox News Digital investigation shows how a network tied to Neville Roy Singham turns activism into coordinated global protest movements — from Cuba to U.S. cities — using a repeatable playbook of messaging, mobilization and media amplification.

news-global-econ.title: Fox News Poll: Sour voters say Washington is out of touch
news-global-econ.description: A new national poll finds Trump's disapproval hits a second-term high of 59%, with his inflation approval sinking to 28% as voter pessimism grows.

news-global-econ.title: Dementia risk signals could lie in simple blood pressure readings, say researchers
news-global-econ.description: New research suggests that routine blood pressure checks may predict dementia risk years before symptoms, with one metric linked to a 76% higher risk in adults under 65.

news-global-econ.description:
Donald Trump is the first modern president bold enough to call China our enemy, Sen. Jim Banks (R-IN) told Breitbart News.

news-global-soc.title: Stephen A Smith tells progressive left to ‘shut the hell up’ over voter ID laws
news-global-soc.description: Stephen A. Smith delivered blunt remarks on voter ID laws, calling out progressive critics while also taking aim at President Donald Trump and Gov. Gavin Newsom during his “Straight Shooter" segment.
